creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Version 3.2.5 of the net-im/telegram-desktop port was merged to the 2021Q4 quarterly branch by olivier yesterday.

This should close this bug - the updated packages will be available within a few days after the next package run.

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?h=2021Q4&id=a47843add9bfe2de7692af3c9928a4e6d4961046
